articles.title: Bokf Na Trims Position in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
articles.summary: Bokf Na reduced its holdings in The Walt Disney Company (DIS) by 5% in the third quarter, selling 8,416 shares and retaining 160,662 shares valued at approximately $18.4 million. Despite this reduction, other large institutions like Norges Bank and Viking Global made significant increases in their holdings, with institutional investors collectively owning about 65.71% of Disney's stock. Analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Disney with an average price target of $135.80, following the company's recent beat on Q1 EPS and revenue estimates.

articles.title: Paul Roeder Named Chief Communications Officer Of The Walt Disney Company
articles.summary: Paul Roeder, a 25-year Disney veteran, has been appointed Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Communications Officer of The Walt Disney Company, effective March 19, reporting directly to incoming CEO Josh D’Amaro. Roeder will lead Disney’s global communications strategy, overseeing media relations, executive communications, public affairs, and corporate social responsibility. He previously headed communications for Disney Entertainment Studios, Direct-to-Consumer, and International, playing a key role in major acquisitions and film releases.

articles.title: What's in Your Stomach? Jennifer Garner Celebrates Once Upon a Farm Products at Disney California Adventure
articles.summary: Jennifer Garner's baby food brand, Once Upon a Farm, is now available at Disney California Adventure, specifically at Fillmore's Taste-In in Cars Land. Garner celebrated this milestone at the Disney California Adventure Food & Wine Festival, where her brand also sponsors a special shaded picnic area. This area will be available until April 27, 2026.

articles.title: Disney 2026 shareholder meeting goes live in March 18 webcast
articles.summary: The Walt Disney Company (NYSE: DIS) will webcast its annual shareholder meeting live on March 18, 2026, starting at 1:00 p.m. ET/10:00 a.m. PT. The event will include remarks from management and will be accessible via the company's investor relations website. An archived version of the webcast will also be available.
